title: Fix handling of nil volumes
body:
Currently if a user passes in a -v with
-v $bogus:/foobar

We crash.  This will throw a proper error.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: Validate seems to be going haywire again.
LGTM, couple small nits which can be cleaned up later if you don't have other changes to make.

Prevents the panic for me:

```
$ bin/podman version
Version:       0.12.2-dev
Go Version:    go1.11.2
Git Commit:    "16064a1d7e0b18a00a5b92706275e610cfa068af"
Built:         Wed Jan  9 21:45:49 2019
OS/Arch:       linux/amd64
$ echo $foo

$ sudo bin/podman run --rm -it -v $foo:/host registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:29
host directory can not be empty
$
```
One more issue in the tests, fix it and I'll merge
